conbody.codeblock: duckdata> add entry (mallard) ; 1 entry added (0.05 sec) duckdata> _
conbody.p: To add a duck species to your database, type add entry followed by the name of the duck in parentheses on the command line and press Enter.
conbody.lq: How much fairer than the pool before the farmer's door, in which his ducks swim! Hither the clean wild ducks come. Nature has no human inhabitant who appreciates her. The birds with their plumage and their notes are in harmony with the flowers, but what youth or maiden conspires with the wild luxuriant beauty of Nature?
